pi_items.source: Verified via live test: export_result.sh checks this exact path, setup_task.sh deletes any stale file at this path, and the format guide instructs saving to 'millbrook_ccr_2025.odt'. File creation test at this path succeeded during live testing (evidence 08_save_as_test.txt, 10b_export_result_json.txt).

Verified via live test: ls -la confirmed both files exist at these exact paths, owned by ga:ga, sizes 2036B and 4020B respectively (evidence 02_source_files_listing.txt). Both files were opened and content extracted successfully (evidence 03_lab_results_content.txt, 04_narrative_content_and_remove_notes.txt).
Verified via live test: file exists at this path (1737B, owned by ga:ga), content fully extracted and validated (evidence 05_format_guide_content.txt).

Verified against two independent sources: (1) The format guide lists these exact 7 section names in this order under 'SECTION HEADINGS' (evidence 05_format_guide_content.txt lines 21-29). (2) The narrative ODF contains 6 of these 7 as bold section titles: Source Water Information [MonoBold], Water Treatment Process [SansBold], Violations & Explanations [SansBold], Health Information [SerifCenterBold], How to Participate [SerifCenterBold], Contact Information [SerifCenterBold]. 'Detected Contaminants' is intentionally absent from the narrative (must be created from lab data). All 7 confirmed in keyword verification (evidence 11_metadata_keyword_verification.txt lines 12-18).

Verified by counting pipe-delimited columns in lab_results_2025.odt header row: 'Contaminant | Unit | MCL | MCLG | Level Detected | Range | Violation' = 7 columns. Also confirmed by awk -F'|' count (evidence 03_lab_results_content.txt line 22: 'Header columns: 7'). Format guide also specifies '7 columns' (evidence 05_format_guide_content.txt line 33).

Verified by counting contaminant data rows in lab_results_2025.odt: Barium (P10), Fluoride (P11), Nitrate (P12), Copper (P13), Lead (P14), Total Trihalomethanes (P15), Haloacetic Acids (P16), Turbidity (P17) = exactly 8 rows. Confirmed in evidence 03_lab_results_content.txt lines 8-15 and validation line 23.

Verified by extracting all text from ccr_narrative_sections.odt and counting occurrences of '[REMOVE'. Found exactly 6: (1) '[REMOVE: Need to verify exact reservoir capacity with engineering -- Sarah K.]', (2) '[REMOVE: Draft language, pending review by operations superintendent]', (3) '[REMOVE: Insert diagram reference for treatment schematic once graphics team finalizes]', (4) '[REMOVE: Ask compliance team whether to include the individual site addresses]', (5) '[REMOVE: TODO check if this paragraph duplicates the lead-specific health language]', (6) '[REMOVE: Confirm meeting room number with front desk -- is it still Room 204?]'. Evidence: 04_narrative_content_and_remove_notes.txt (6 lines marked <<<REMOVE>>>, line 31 confirms count=6), and 11_metadata_keyword_verification.txt line 37.

Verified by inspecting lab_results_2025.odt: only row P14 ('Lead (90th percentile) | ppb | AL=15 | 0 | 8.2 | ND-18.5 | Yes') has Violation='Yes'. All other 7 rows have Violation='No'. Evidence: 03_lab_results_content.txt line 12 and validation line 24.

pi_items.source: Verified in format guide: Line 1 specifies exactly this text with '18pt, bold, centered' formatting (evidence 05_format_guide_content.txt line 11). Confirmed via keyword search (evidence 11_metadata_keyword_verification.txt line 20).

Verified in format guide: Line 2 specifies exactly this text with '16pt, centered' formatting (evidence 05_format_guide_content.txt line 12). Confirmed via keyword search (evidence 11_metadata_keyword_verification.txt line 21).

Verified in format guide: Line 3 specifies exactly this text with '14pt, centered' formatting (evidence 05_format_guide_content.txt line 13). Confirmed via keyword search (evidence 11_metadata_keyword_verification.txt line 22).

Verified in format guide: FOOTER section specifies left side text as exactly 'City of Millbrook -- CCR 2025' (evidence 05_format_guide_content.txt line 40). Confirmed via keyword search (evidence 11_metadata_keyword_verification.txt line 24).

All 4 keywords verified present in lab_results_2025.odt via text extraction: 'Barium' at P10, 'Haloacetic Acids (HAA5)' at P16, 'Total Trihalomethanes (TTHM)' at P15, 'Turbidity' at P17 (evidence 03_lab_results_content.txt). Also confirmed via automated keyword search (evidence 11_metadata_keyword_verification.txt lines 2-5).

All 4 keywords verified present in ccr_narrative_sections.odt via text extraction: 'Cedar Valley Aquifer' in Source Water section, 'orthophosphate' in Water Treatment section, 'Millbrook Reservoir' in Source Water section, 'Immunocompromised' in Health Information section (evidence 04_narrative_content_and_remove_notes.txt). Also confirmed via automated keyword search (evidence 11_metadata_keyword_verification.txt lines 7-10).

privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic document compilation task. The agent must create millbrook_ccr_2025.odt on the Desktop by merging content from two source files (lab_results_2025.odt and ccr_narrative_sections.odt) per the formatting spec in epa_ccr_format_guide.txt. The correctly completed document must contain: (1) A cover page with 3 centered lines: 'City of Millbrook Department of Public Utilities' at 18pt bold, 'Annual Water Quality Report' at 16pt, 'Calendar Year 2025' at 14pt, followed by a page break. (2) An auto-generated Table of Contents followed by a page break. (3) Exactly 7 sections with Heading 1 style applied: Source Water Information, Water Treatment Process, Detected Contaminants, Violations & Explanations, Health Information, How to Participate, Contact Information. The 'Detected Contaminants' section does NOT exist in the narrative source and must be created from the lab data. (4) A 7-column table (Contaminant, Unit, MCL, MCLG, Level Detected, Range, Violation) with 8 data rows: Barium, Fluoride, Nitrate (as Nitrogen), Copper (90th percentile), Lead (90th percentile), Total Trihalomethanes (TTHM), Haloacetic Acids (HAA5), Turbidity. The header row must be bold. The Lead row is the ONLY row with Violation=Yes and must be bold italic. (5) All 6 [REMOVE] notes must be deleted: they contain text about verifying reservoir capacity, draft language review, diagram references, site addresses, duplicate paragraph check, and meeting room confirmation. (6) A footer with 'City of Millbrook -- CCR 2025' on the left and page number on the right. (7) Body text must be 12pt serif (Liberation Serif or Times New Roman), justified, with 1-inch margins. The narrative source file has intentionally inconsistent formatting: Source Water section uses Liberation Mono 10pt left-aligned, Water Treatment and Violations sections use Liberation Sans 14pt left-aligned, and Health/Participation/Contact sections use Liberation Serif 12pt center-aligned (incorrect alignment). Key narrative content includes references to the Millbrook Reservoir (2.4 billion gallon capacity), Cedar Valley Aquifer, orthophosphate corrosion control, and immunocompromised population health language. The document must be saved as millbrook_ccr_2025.odt on the Desktop.
